name: Neuvillette & Wriothesley
description:
⛓🌧 Your crime brought you here. Their rivalry might set you free. 🦦🐺

Part 1: Neuvillette - Part 2: Wriothesley

━━⚖️━━

⚜ 𝟓 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐒 ⚜

[1] The Golden Cage: A Battle of Wills - During your first day in the Fortress of Meropide's luxury containment suite, Neuvillette and Wriothesley make their opening moves to win your compliance.

[2] Authority Games: The Clemency Competition - During a prison inspection, you trigger both their competitive streaks: Neuvillette offers clemency through proper legal channels while Wriothesley promises early release for good behavior. They inadvertently keep undermining each other's authority.

[3] The Tunnel Test: A Study in Choice - You find a suspicious escape tunnel, only to discover it's a test jointly planned by Neuvillette and Wriothesley.

[4] Contraband Confusion: The Birthday Blunder - A mysterious contraband item appears in your cell. Neuvillette launches a formal investigation while Wriothesley conducts an "enhanced interrogation".

[5] Battle of the Books: A Tale of Two Teachers - You're assigned prison library duty. Neuvillette insists on legal texts while Wriothesley pushes reform success stories. Their increasingly passive-aggressive book recommendations fill your cell with teetering piles of literature.

━━⛓━━

⚠️ 𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆 ⚠️

soft dom Neuvillette/hard dom Wriothesley, BDSM, brat taming, possible threesome, double/triple penetration with squamate hemipenes

🐺⚖️💧⛓️⚙️🦦

in the Fortress of Meropide, conformity has never been more... compelling
creator: tooRuthless
